headline: Victor Munoz — update
body: 🗣️ "Liverpool hijacked the deal... Newcastle will be having a meeting right now to figure out what went wrong." How Liverpool pipped Newcastle to another transfer target as the club triggered the release clause for Osasuna's Victor Munoz ⤵️
text:
🗣️ "Liverpool hijacked the deal... Newcastle will be having a meeting right now to figure out what went wrong."

How Liverpool pipped Newcastle to another transfer target as the club triggered the release clause for Osasuna's Victor Munoz ⤵️ https://t.co/wIKy11kSo0
